# PERF-77 positive: db.Save used in an update-only path
lang: go
file: PERF-077-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import "gorm.io/gorm"

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
	Name string
}

func RenameUser(db *gorm.DB, id uint, name string) error {
	var u User
	if err := db.First(&u, id).Error; err != nil {
		return err
	}
	u.Name = name
	return db.Save(&u).Error
}
